human_actions_pending.context: 18-UAT.md created, test 1 (copy/paste inside navigated Group) awaiting response

decisions.decision: Use `with nuke.lastHitGroup():` context managers rather than `all_nodes_in_context()` alone
decisions.rationale: Live testing revealed Qt signals fire in Root context — nuke.thisGroup() had already reset by the time invoke() ran. Capturing lastHitGroup() in get_items() and restoring it in invoke() is the correct fix.

decisions.decision: Replace nuke.zoomToFitSelected() with nuke.zoom() in navigate_to_anchor/backdrop
decisions.rationale: nuke.zoomToFitSelected() always targets root DAG regardless of context; nuke.zoom() targets the currently focused panel (confirmed by live test).

decisions.decision: Group View zoom limitation accepted as-is
decisions.rationale: No public Nuke API exists to pan a specific Group View floating panel. Alt+A surfaces the right nodes from Group View but does not pan the panel — documented known limitation.

next_action: Run /gsd:verify-work 18 — UAT file exists at 18-UAT.md, present test 1: copy/paste inside a navigated Group
context_notes: Phase 18 code is complete and committed. Plans 01-02 added all_nodes_in_context() helper. The subsequent debugging session (this conversation) discovered that nuke.thisGroup() resets to Root in Qt signal context and in Group View floating panels — fixed with with nuke.lastHitGroup(): wrappers at all entry points. Six UAT tests cover both navigated-Group and Group-View-panel scenarios.
